Chang now is a simple question and

don't use titles with first

of the Examiner
only say good afternoon

there are two tips I want you to

the contraction my
names now the reason this is important
is because this is part of

from is to my

smile look at the examiner in the eyes
and

The Examiner will ask you what can I

you could reply you could
say you can call me Ming or you could
say just just call me Ming or please
call me Ming so those are three possible
answers that you can give now for some
tips my first tip is please do not
explain why people call you
this this is not really part of the test
this is only the greeting so you're
going to give the examiner simple clear
answers you don't need to add more

keep your answer short you can see here
